prompt: Create a warm cinematic close-up portrait of a contemplative young woman in a dark, moody interior, lit almost entirely by one glowing candle on the right side of the frame. The subject is centered slightly left, shown from chest up, with long dark wavy hair falling over both shoulders, wearing dark earthy clothing with subtle embroidered details around the neckline and shoulders. Her head is angled gently downward and to the right as if looking toward the candle, but her face is completely obscured by a single solid square censor block in a warm medium-brown color placed over the central face area. Include exactly 1 candle: a tall cream-colored candle near the lower-right quadrant with a bright teardrop flame and soft golden halo. Use deep black-green shadows, shallow depth of field, film grain, low-key lighting, soft golden highlights on the hair and neck, and an intimate candlelit Renaissance-inspired atmosphere. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no additional candles.
